history.en: Originating in 17th-century Germany, bred down from larger terriers to be skilled ratters in homes, kitchens and stables. Refined in Munich and Berlin, recognized by AKC in 1936. Name translates to 'monkey-like terrier'.
history.zh: 起源于17世纪的德国，由较大的梗犬培育而成，擅长在家庭、厨房和马厩中捕鼠。在慕尼黑和柏林得到改良，于1936年获得美国养犬俱乐部（AKC）认可。其名称意为“像猴子的梗犬”。

overview.en: The Affenpinscher, known as the 'monkey terrier,' is a small but confident toy breed originating in 17th-century Germany. With a wiry coat, expressive face, and a lively, alert demeanor, these dogs are playful, loyal, and courageous. They possess a terrier-like tenacity and a curious nature, often described as big dogs in small bodies. Affenpinschers are intelligent and independent, yet they form strong bonds with their families. Their bold personality makes them excellent watchdogs, though they can be stubborn. Despite their small size, they are energetic and require mental stimulation. This breed thrives on attention and can be reserved with strangers, but is affectionate with loved ones. Their unique appearance and spirited character make them a charming companion for experienced owners who appreciate a dog with personality and spunk.
overview.zh: 猴面梗，又称'猴子梗'，是一种源自17世纪德国的小型但自信的玩具犬种。它们拥有粗糙的毛发、富有表情的面孔以及活泼警觉的气质，性格顽皮、忠诚且勇敢。这种狗具有梗犬般的坚韧和好奇心，常被形容为'小身体里住着大狗'。猴面梗聪明独立，但与家人关系紧密。它们大胆的性格使其成为出色的看门犬，尽管有时会显得固执。虽然体型小，但它们精力充沛，需要精神刺激。该品种喜欢被关注，对陌生人可能有所保留，但对亲人充满感情。其独特的外貌和活泼的个性使其成为有经验的主人的迷人伴侣，尤其适合欣赏个性与活力的犬主。

care.en: Daily care for an Affenpinscher includes regular grooming to maintain their wiry coat. Brush two to three times a week, and hand-strip or clip every few months to prevent matting. Clean their face wrinkles gently to avoid skin infections. Exercise needs are moderate: a daily walk and indoor play sessions suffice, as they adapt well to apartment living. However, they have bursts of energy and enjoy interactive games. Schedule annual veterinary check-ups, keep vaccinations current, and maintain dental hygiene with regular brushing. Nail trimming every few weeks is essential. Affenpinschers are prone to patellar luxation and hip dysplasia, so monitor their joints. Early socialization and consistent routines help them thrive. Despite their small size, they need mental engagement to prevent boredom-related behaviors.
care.zh: 猴面梗的日常护理包括定期打理其粗糙的毛发。每周刷毛两到三次，每隔几个月进行拔毛或修剪以防止打结。轻柔清洁面部褶皱以避免皮肤感染。运动需求适中：每天散步和室内玩耍即可，因为它们能很好地适应公寓生活。但它们有爆发性的精力，喜欢互动游戏。安排年度兽医检查，保持疫苗接种更新，并通过定期刷牙维护牙齿健康。每隔几周修剪指甲至关重要。猴面梗易患髌骨脱位和髋关节发育不良，因此需关注关节健康。早期社交和一致的生活规律有助于它们茁壮成长。尽管体型小，它们需要精神刺激以防止因无聊而产生的不良行为。

training.en: Training an Affenpinscher requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. This breed is intelligent but can be stubborn, so harsh methods are counterproductive. Use treats, praise, and play as rewards. Start socialization early, exposing them to various people, pets, and environments to curb their natural wariness. Keep training sessions short and fun to maintain their interest. Crate training helps with housebreaking and provides a safe space. Focus on basic commands like sit, stay, and recall, as their terrier instincts may lead them to chase. They respond well to clicker training. Avoid repetitive drills; instead, incorporate games that challenge their mind. Establish yourself as a calm leader, as they may test boundaries. With consistent guidance, they become well-mannered companions.
training.zh: 训练猴面梗需要耐心、一致性和正向强化。该犬种聪明但可能固执，因此严厉的方法适得其反。使用零食、表扬和玩耍作为奖励。尽早开始社交化，让它们接触不同的人、宠物和环境，以减少天生的警惕性。保持训练课程简短有趣以维持其兴趣。笼内训练有助于家庭训练，并提供安全空间。重点教授基本指令如坐、停和召回，因为它们的梗犬本能可能导致追逐行为。它们对响片训练反应良好。避免重复练习，而是融入挑战思维的游戏。确立自己为冷静的领导者，因为它们可能会试探界限。通过一致的引导，它们能成为举止得体的伴侣。

diet.en: Feed your Affenpinscher a high-quality dog food appropriate for small breeds with high energy levels. Divide their daily portion into two meals to prevent hypoglycemia, a risk in toy breeds. Choose food with real meat as the first ingredient, balanced with healthy fats and carbohydrates. Avoid fillers and artificial additives. Portion control is crucial to prevent obesity, which exacerbates joint issues. Treats should be limited and used mainly for training. Fresh water must always be available. Some Affenpinschers have sensitive stomachs; introduce new foods gradually. Consult your vet for specific dietary needs, especially if your dog has allergies or health conditions. Supplements like glucosamine can support joint health, but only under veterinary advice. Monitor weight regularly and adjust portions accordingly.
diet.zh: 为您的猴面梗选择适合小型犬且能量水平高的优质狗粮。将每日食量分成两餐，以防止低血糖——这是玩具犬种的风险。选择以真实肉类为首要成分的狗粮，并搭配健康脂肪和碳水化合物。避免填充物和人工添加剂。控制食量至关重要，以防止肥胖，而肥胖会加剧关节问题。零食应限量，主要用于训练。始终提供新鲜饮用水。部分猴面梗肠胃敏感，新食物需逐步引入。咨询兽医以确定特定饮食需求，尤其当您的狗有过敏或健康问题时。补充剂如葡萄糖胺可支持关节健康，但需在兽医指导下使用。定期监测体重并相应调整食量。

livingTips.en: Affenpinschers are well-suited for apartment living due to their small size and moderate exercise needs. They are active indoors and do not require a yard, though a secure outdoor space for play is appreciated. They can be territorial and may bark at noises, making them good watchdogs. This breed does best in homes without very young children, as their terrier nature may lead to snapping if provoked. They can coexist with other pets if raised together, but may show dominance toward same-sex dogs. Affenpinschers are loyal to their family and thrive on companionship; they dislike being left alone for long periods. Provide cozy bedding, interactive toys, and a consistent routine. Their adaptability makes them suitable for singles, seniors, or families with older children who understand dog behavior.
livingTips.zh: 猴面梗因其体型小和运动需求适中，非常适合公寓生活。它们在室内活跃，不需要院子，但有安全的户外空间玩耍更佳。它们可能具有领地意识并对噪音吠叫，因此是出色的看门犬。该品种最好在没有非常年幼儿童的家庭中生活，因为其梗犬天性在被挑衅时可能会咬人。如果从小一起养，它们能与其他宠物共存，但可能对同性狗表现出支配欲。猴面梗对家庭忠诚，喜欢陪伴，不喜欢长时间独处。提供舒适的床铺、互动玩具和一致的生活规律。它们的适应性使其适合单身人士、老年人或有了解狗行为的大孩子的家庭。
